name: Repository Click
description: User clicks on a repository sprite to select or deselect

scenarios.description: User clicked on a repository to select it

events.collection-map.repository-clicked: Action: {{action}} - Clicked on repository {{repository.id}} in collection {{collection.id}}

scenarios.description: User clicked empty space to deselect

events.collection-map.repository-clicked: Action: {{action}} - Clicked empty space to deselect in collection {{collection.id}}
